Daily Performance

S1+ S2
spend/subs/CPR/CPI from S1 · CPA, FB%, IG% from S2
Source 1 (subscription export) drives subscriptions, CPR (= Spend ÷ subscriptions), CPI, CTR, CPM and Vidrow share. Source 2 (activation + placement export) drives activations (= installs × campaign rate ), CPA (= Spend ÷ activations), and the Facebook / Instagram / Other split. The two exports cover slightly different totals/date ranges, so each block is labelled with its source. Platform = Facebook / Instagram / Other (Audience Network, Messenger, Threads); generic “Feed”, Marketplace and Search → Facebook. Per-slice activation rate isn’t in the export, so CPA tracks CPI.
